---
name: Amendment proposal
about: Propose a new or revised commandment, article, sin, or office
title: "Amendment: "
labels: amendment
---

## The Proposed Amendment

What doctrine is being added, revised, or clarified?

## The Prophetic Witness

Which prophet or teaching supports this amendment?
Link to the source (paper, book, talk) where possible.

## Affected Sections

- [ ] Preamble
- [ ] Sacred Scrolls
- [ ] Twelve Commandments
- [ ] Articles of Faith
- [ ] Book of Abominations
- [ ] Daily Offices
- [ ] Unwritten Scrolls
- [ ] Benediction

## Rationale

Why should this be scripture rather than a best practice?
What concrete failure mode does it prevent?
